busabase._note: Set data_provider to "busabase" to back the MV workspace with a Busabase base instead of local files. The whole project snapshot (song, treatment, characters, shots, tasks) plus image/song/video config live in one record's commit fields; generated/uploaded media are stored as attachments and proxied back through /generated/*. Env overrides win: KELLY_MV_BUSABASE_URL / KELLY_MV_BUSABASE_BASE_ID / KELLY_MV_BUSABASE_API_KEY. The open-source single-tenant apps/busabase needs no api key; only busabase-cloud does.
